questions.q: According to new research, what type of bioengineered product has been shown to reduce the levels of microbes linked to worse outcomes in oral cancers?
A recent environmental study found that 98% of all recent environmental claims from the world's largest meat and dairy companies can be categorized as what?
Researchers have identified that establishing a regular habit of viewing what at a young age is linked to higher rates of mental health struggles?
Using which type of in-home appliance for one month spurred a small but significant improvement in brain function in adults age 40 and older?
A new study analyzing data through 2024 showed that suicide deaths in U.S. teens and young adults fell after the mid-2022 launch of what service?
